programme.desc:

With that wind against a 2.4m swell, Ribeira d'Ilhas will be a washing machine today.
🌊 Swell: 2.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 24.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 53.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.6m
📋 Significant wind chop
